experiments.name: Declared model identity baseline
experiments.question: Is the endpoint behavior statistically consistent with the trusted reference?
experiments.method: 8 cells x 25 samples, temperature 1.0, fixed system prompt, repeat twice on separate days
experiments.public_language: match / uncertain / mismatch / insufficient; never claim fraud

experiments.name: Seven-day routing drift
experiments.question: Does the same declared model remain behaviorally stable for seven days?
experiments.method: Run AR-FP-001 at 10:00 CST daily with the same model id and test-set version
